reference: I started on a beta blocker about three weeks ago for my blood pressure. It has helped, but I now find that I can't get or maintain an erection. My doctor said this will go away after I stop taking the medication. I have lost seventeen pounds in two weeks by exercising and dieting. How long after taking the medication will I regain my erectile function?
text: I started on a beta blocker about three weeks ago for my blood pressure, but I now find that I can't get or maintain control. My doctor said this will go away after I stop taking the medication. I have lost 17 pounds in two weeks by exercising and dieting. How long after taking the medication will I regain my erectile function?
